mapper.sql: id, source_id, source_type, manifest_hash, trigger_type, resolver_mode, resolver_decision, sync_action, status, matched_source_id, compile_job_id, evidence_json::text as evidence_json, error_message, requested_at, updated_at, started_at, finished_at
mapper.select: insert into source_sync_runs ( source_id, source_type, manifest_hash, trigger_type, resolver_mode, resolver_decision, sync_action, status, matched_source_id, compile_job_id, evidence_json, error_message, requested_at, updated_at, started_at, finished_at ) values ( #{run.sourceId}, #{run.sourceType}, #{run.manifestHash}, #{run.triggerType}, #{run.resolverMode}, #{run.resolverDecision}, #{run.syncAction}, #{run.status}, #{run.matchedSourceId}, #{run.compileJobId}, #{run.evidenceJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{run.errorMessage}, #{run.requestedAt}, #{run.updatedAt}, #{run.startedAt}, #{run.finishedAt} ) returning id
mapper.update: update source_sync_runs set source_id = #{run.sourceId}, source_type = #{run.sourceType}, manifest_hash = #{run.manifestHash}, trigger_type = #{run.triggerType}, resolver_mode = #{run.resolverMode}, resolver_decision = #{run.resolverDecision}, sync_action = #{run.syncAction}, status = #{run.status}, matched_source_id = #{run.matchedSourceId}, compile_job_id = #{run.compileJobId}, evidence_json = #{run.evidenceJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, error_message = #{run.errorMessage}, updated_at = #{run.updatedAt}, started_at = #{run.startedAt}, finished_at = #{run.finishedAt} where id = #{run.id}
mapper.select: select from source_sync_runs where source_id = #{sourceId} order by requested_at desc, id desc
select from source_sync_runs order by requested_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}

select from source_sync_runs where manifest_hash = #{manifestHash} and source_id is null and status in ('QUEUED', 'MATCHING', 'MATERIALIZING', 'COMPILE_QUEUED', 'RUNNING') order by requested_at desc, id desc limit 1
select from source_sync_runs where source_id = #{sourceId} and status in ('QUEUED', 'MATCHING', 'MATERIALIZING', 'COMPILE_QUEUED', 'RUNNING') order by requested_at desc, id desc
